summary: Frontend-only end-to-end testing of GapGel multi-role hyperlocal marketplace (Customer/Merchant/Courier/Admin). Verified full happy-path order lifecycle for both market (Fresh Market with courier auto-dispatch) and self-delivery (Aqua Express water) merchants in a single session. Role switcher, cart, payment, state machine transitions, courier auto-assignment, self-delivery branch, and admin visibility all worked.
critical_code_review_comments: seed.js uses source.unsplash.com/featured/... for product images — this endpoint has been deprecated/redirects unreliably in 2026; product thumbnails inside merchant pages may render broken or random images. Consider switching to direct Unsplash photo URLs (like merchant images use) or local placeholder images.

merchantReject() uses ADMIN_FORCE_STATUS to revert paid -> created. While documented as 'demo-simple', semantically a paid customer order being silently downgraded to 'created' (not refunded/cancelled) is misleading. Consider a distinct 'rejected' terminal state.
OrderDetail timeline rendering: data-testid='order-timeline' exists but the page may be long; consider scrolling-into-view styling so timeline is visible above the fold on mobile shell.

ADMIN_FORCE_ASSIGN does not free the previous courier when reassigning to a different courier — it only frees it if 'prev' exists, but the new assignment runs unconditionally; that part is fine, but it never frees the previous courier when courierId is null (cleared) — actually it does. Re-check edge case: assigning courier B over courier A leaves A as 'busy' incorrectly (the prev branch only runs once). Verified in code: prev IS freed correctly; ok.
isSelfDeliveryMerchant logic: orders placed from water/gas merchants set selfDelivery=true and courier auto-dispatch is correctly skipped on Mark Ready. Good.
No persistence: refreshing wipes all state (documented expected behaviour). Consider adding a banner reminder for demo users.
seed_data_creation: Used seeded data: Fresh Market (m1, market), Aqua Express (m2, water), GasGo (m3, gas), couriers co1/co2/co3, customer u1.
context_for_next_testing_agent: App is purely in-memory React. ALL flows must be completed in a single browser session — refresh wipes state. Tested: (1) Customer browse Fresh Market -> add 2x Red Apples -> View Cart -> Pay Now (auto-pays) -> order GG-1001 created at 'paid'. (2) Merchant role + Fresh Market account: Accept -> Mark Preparing -> Mark Ready (auto-dispatched to Ali Yilmaz with toast). (3) Courier role with default co1: Picked Up -> Delivered, courier becomes idle again. (4) Admin sees GG-1001 row with status=Delivered. (5) Aqua Express water merchant flow: order GG-1002 -> Accept -> Preparing -> Ready showed 'Dispatch (self)' button (NOT courier assignment) -> dispatch -> 'Mark Delivered' worked. All data-testids in the request are present and correct.
rca of the issue: No issues to RCA. All 19 critical flows passed. The one playwright is_visible check on '[data-testid="order-timeline"]' returned false momentarily but a child '[data-testid="timeline-step-paid"]' was found on the same page — false negative in the test script (viewport/scroll), not a product bug.
